title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Standalone headset mode shows only headset battery indicator and headset-related software update info when Flamingo/Spoonbill is not paired with Charge Case
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Poly Voyager Legend 30 headset is currently connected.
3. Power on the Poly Voyager Legend 50 / Poly Voyager Legend 30 headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED flashes.
4. On the app Home screen, tap the device name or the device card to open Device Settings.
5. Observe the battery indicator displayed on the Device Settings screen.
6. Navigate to Settings → Software Update from the app menu.
7. Observe the information displayed on the Software Update screen.
expected: The headset connects to the app as a standalone device. Only the headset battery indicator is shown (no charge case battery indicator). In Settings > Software Update, only headset-related information (e.g., headset firmware version, headset update status) is displayed, with no charge case information present.
